samples.text: All birds are animals. A rock is not a bird. Therefore, is a rock an animal?
Every bird belongs to the category of animals. A rock is not a bird. Does it follow that a rock is an animal?
All avians are animals. A granite rock is not an avian. Therefore, is a granite rock an animal?
A rock is not in the group of birds. Only birds are stated to be animals here. Based on this, is a rock an animal?
All birds are animals. A rock is not a bird. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is a rock an animal?
